title: stachys recta subsp. subcrenata
intro: Stachys recta subsp. subcrenata, also known as the upright betony, is a subspecies of the betony plant, which is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The upright betony plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. This plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as relief from anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, as well as reducing pain and inflammation. The herbal preparations of upright betony include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate specific health concerns.
